briefs.title: Council to vote on granting FortisBC a right-of-way on Burnaby Mountain land
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on allowing FortisBC to access two City-owned properties on Burnaby Mountain to install and maintain natural gas lines. This would support upgrades at the Mintara restaurant in the Burnaby Mountain Conservation Area.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the April 14, 2026 council decision if your business operates near Burnaby Mountain or relies on FortisBC gas infrastructure.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — FortisBC Burnaby Mountain right-of-way approval

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Food Service, Natural Resources
